name: DIGtv
description: MTV-style channels: interleave music videos with station bumpers into native playlists that play on every Jellyfin client.
overview: Build MTV-style channels from your own playlists/folders.

versions.changelog: Retarget to Jellyfin 10.11.x. Fixes the plugin being dropped on restart after the server updated from 10.10 to 10.11. Adds per-channel auto re-shuffle (hourly/daily/weekly).
